title: Returned big-endian array assigned to little-endian array parameter ignores left-to-right element mapping (IEEE 1800-2023 7.6)

features.name: function returning big-endian unpacked array assigned to little-endian parameter
features.description: Code should include a function that returns an unpacked array with big-endian ordering being assigned to a localparam declared with little-endian ordering

features.name: big-endian to little-endian unpacked array assignment element mapping
features.description: Code should include assignment between unpacked arrays with different endian ordering where left-to-right element correspondence per IEEE 1800-2023 7.6 is required
